# Spider Parser

> A clean reader view for news articles and web pages. Paste any article URL to get a distraction-free reading experience, with customisable fonts and themes.

## What this site does

Spider Parser fetches and parses any public news article or web page and presents it in a clean, readable format. It strips ads, navigation, and visual clutter, preserving only the article content, headline, publication date, and lead image.

## Features

- Clean reader view for any public URL
- Customisable themes and fonts
- Text-to-speech playback
- Google Translate integration
- Table of contents for long articles

## Author
